About

I came across Michael Parenti earlier this year (2020) and wanted to write transcriptions of his speeches for those who, for which ever reason, would prefer to read than watch (or do both.) I will be periodically updating the website. I am aiming for one speech per week. If you'd like to send a request, please email: parentitexts@protonmail.com

Feel free to use the transcripts as you see fit. Rehost, post them anywhere, etc.
